caption: now If someone swears at my dad, I’ll come for you. #daddysgirl #dad #ref
transcript: And just like that, I'm back to loving life again, dreaming

when you're 26 and realize

fused_text:
[CAPTION] now If someone swears at my dad, I’ll come for you. #daddysgirl #dad #ref

rewrite: At 26, realizing that high school referees are often retired parents who volunteer their time can change your perspective on how you treated them as a teenager.
